sp.speaker: Hunhullus
sp.speech: Hayiin do-hok!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Mo hu-da, Ten-no. I win. You let?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Let's call it even.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Call it - peace offer!

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Enough!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: What did you see?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Tau.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: How?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: But not enough.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: 'Not enough'?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: This is the only way we find -

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Flooding their head with polluted histories? I won't - Come, Tenno. Let's get you dry.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: It's okay, Loid. have to... I want to.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Some things are best forgotten.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I had a friend, Loid. Like me. His name was... was... Adis.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Again.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: How late the we?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Relax. We've got this.

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: We swore to carry the sacred light of our dominion into the deepest dark, and this we have done! Swear now to defend this holy treaty alongside our blessed and brave creations: the Sentients of Tau.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Can you believe we used to be at war?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Not joke, Tenno.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: It's just... insane. When all the time it could have been like this.

xml.sp: Grineer AnnouncerGuve me someklung to shoot. Ron't det garr guigrr rorn. - Give me something to shoot. Don't let your guard down.
Grineer AnnouncerTray sharg, Hu rear someklung. - Stay sharp, I hear something.
Grineer AnnouncerGuve me someklung to shoot. - Give me something to shoot.
Grineer AnnouncerKekome an Exhumus. Ron't det garr guigrr rorn. - Become an Eximus. Don't let your guard down.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: What your parents say, if they here?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Oh, they'd invite you to dinner, then panic over what to feed you.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Did they ever tell you what happened to your ancestors?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Making up the great Rail, was the telling. First you serve as labor. Then you serve as parts.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I've been working on some new moves. Gonna let me try them out on you?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: First we find new fighting place! We get caught, Grineer think war-times come again!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Anything you want to go over before Itzam grills you?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Adis... maybe forgot Naramon principles section 8?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Again? Okay, don't sweat it. I've got your back.

xml.info: Check on the New Hybrid Project

sp.speaker: Margulis
sp.speech: I trust Itzam over the Orokin. Have him report to me daily.

sp.speaker: Daklo
sp.speech: Disgusting, isn't it? Orokin gold - wasted! I wonder... which of you would this aberration attack first?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Stupid.

sp.speaker: Daklo
sp.speech: Watch your mouth, void-lugger.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Ah, please, please, with me. The place for conflict is in the dojo.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Adis Truth-Bloom, have you adapted to the Tenno Ways?

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: When the applications of Tauron are applied to Naramon's theories, what is the expected outcome?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: A new Somatic connection.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Uh, a Somatic connection new, power increase many?

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: No cheating! If you are tested by the Seven, we must show your evolution to their ways.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: A regression in stability.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Stability regress? Great badness?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: It's a trick question.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Cannot be done! You are tricking.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: No cheating! Especially when the answer is grievously incorrect! Would you embarrass us so before the Seven?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: So... the Seven are coming?

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: The treaty is not as finished as we would wish. The conditions laid upen our stewardship -

sp.speaker: Apex Stentor
sp.speech: Anarch strike is underway! Tauron students, to deployment!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Let's go, 'truth-bloom!'

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Adis did not choose name!

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: Well, praise the Void. You two managed to show up on time. Boro Overlook. Go. Now.

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: We're pinned down, Tenno. Can you give us a miracle?

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: That's the spirit, kiddo. Limb... from.. limb.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Shut up!

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Back! Fall back!

sp.speaker: Prime Grineer
sp.speech: Tenno on sight.

sp.speaker: Prime Grineer
sp.speech: Stand tall.

sp.speaker: Prime Grineer
sp.speech: For the Orokin.

sp.speaker: Prime Grineer
sp.speech: Tenno... savior.

xml.sp: AdisCast and cry, cast and cry | Raise the million pylons high | All our kin are bound to fly | For that far shore forlorn

sp.speaker: Conculyst Zin-Osku
sp.speech: Truth-Bloom!

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: COVERRRR!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Ten-no!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I see them.

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: That was the old Makvos cannon. Can you take it out?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Trust the we.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Go charge up, Adis. I've got your back.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: You are authentic friend, Tenno.

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: 'Xenoflora'. Flowers. The only real alien life we've ever found, and the Sents scarf them down like kubrow chow! Just as well for us they did, eh, Tenno? Suddenly they've all got minds of their own, so no more hivemind, so no more war.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ready?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tau fills me.

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: Take out that gun, Tenno. We're getting pounded!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Tantivy, ha! What say you all? Shall we enlighten this Tenno?

sp.speaker: Anarchs
sp.speech: Tantivy! Tantivy!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: The shields, Adis!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: I got it!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Yarata! Now, Tenno!

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: Good work. This treaty's going to live, Galastra, and you don't get to tear it up. Dropships inbound!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Valdur. My old pet. Better count your flock again, dog, and keep your ships on the ground. Else I'll be set to carving your lost lamb.

sp.speaker: Sentient
sp.speech: Help me Adis!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Hurry, Tenno!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Bad place. Golden-cursed. Long-ago precepting.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: No history taught in those Tenno schools? Peace cannot abide the machines.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You're the only ones keeping this war alive.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Let me show you why.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: But... the blooms make us more than machine! Why does she hate?

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: A place to breathe.

sp.speaker: Sentient
sp.speech: Adis!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: The promise of a home. So lightly surrendered.

xml.info: Note: this dialogue only occurs when observing a dead Summulyst with an orange hologram

sp.speaker: Sentient
sp.speech: Truth-Bloom!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Coming, hive-kin!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Let him go!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Of course! When he's good and ready, child. Sentient TQ-776VL! Repel intruders! So desperate for orders without your xenoflora.

xml.sp: AdisHive-kin, Adis will heal!singingCast and cry, cast and cry | Raise the million pylons high | All our kin are bound to fly | For that far shore forlorn

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I'm sorry! I didn't want to! It was him or me... him or me!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I killed him, Lotus.

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: IVBOK AIO-UN KARIS, MARA LOHK!

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: It knows.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno! The truth of Tau must not be taken from us again. I need you to go back under, however briefly. If the danger becomes too great, in your mind or in this place, you will sense it.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: 'Too far! Take it back!

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: And so you returned without Adis? Most unfortunate. Your, ah, patron has asked me to inquire about... the voices?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: The voices are under control.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Let us hope so. Now. What would you say is Galastra's goal?

xml.info: She's trying to restart the war by turning Sentients hostile.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: War. Using the Sentients as her tools.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: A sound hypothesis. We know she can undo the liberating effect of the blooms.

xml.info: She wants Tau for herself and her followers.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Tau. All of it. Just for her and her people.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: To be promised land as a reward for fighting, only to see it given to the enemy... It must be bitter indeed.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: There are still too many unknown factors.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Ah. the lament of the true Archimedean. 'Insufficient data'.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Your somatic readout indicates emotional stress. I am not judging you for what happened, Tenno. But we must find Adis.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I know where he'll be.

sp.speaker: Daklo
sp.speech: Tenno, I know you're loyal and you want this to work, but you know it as well as I do: there is something deeply amiss with the Sentients. If they're so proud of who they are, then why do they want to be human so badly? And every time they try, it's just off, isn't it? Just know you have a friend in me if you ever need to talk.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Adis?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You lost something.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Many things.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Yeah. Me too.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: I know.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Let's not lose the We also.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Never. So, uh... do you wanna go hunting? With me?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Always.

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: Hold up, Tenno. We just intercepted an Anarch transmission. Listen to this.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: ...confirming debris field. The prey has gone to ground, my hunters. Tantivy!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Adis, get on comms. We need intel. I'm going after them.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno, go after ones with big shiny hat!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Can you narrow it down?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Lus-tra-tus? They lead. They know orders from Galastra. Make them tell!

sp.speaker: Anarch Capsarii
sp.speech: Loffler berries? Waste of good soil. Vineyards for me.

sp.speaker: Anarch Libritor
sp.speech: Tenno scorch the earth, none of us get nothing.

sp.speaker: Anarch Officer
sp.speech: This again, Braz?

sp.speaker: Anarch Capsarii
sp.speech: You know it's all done with drones and gas, right? Tenno don't exist.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: What's Galastra hunting?

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: A shuttle... she has it shot down... the Makvos...

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Dax cannot defy Kuva. But Anarchs defy Orokin? How?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Orokin houses clash all the time. Dax can kill troops, they just can't hurt the Golden Lords themselves.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Maybe through hive-kin... they try to find a way?

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: Slice. Burn. Maim. We love it when you get to cut loose.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Shut. UP.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Adis not talk.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Sorry. Talking to myself.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: How is Galastra controlling Sentients?

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: The xenoflora... without them, they revert to... to...

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: With the blooms, Tau made us free. All know this.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: But what happens if you don't get them?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Hunger. For orders. If none come... hivemind would return.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Gonna scramble this targeting array, Adis. That ought to bring a Lustratus out of hiding.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Okay. Codes.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: The downed shuttle. Where is it?

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Perintol... crater!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Need to redeploy, Adis!

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: Back so soon?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Galastra shot down a shuttle. She's got to be after the passengers.

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: If we can't keep the peace then this treaty's dead in the water. Get back down there, Tenno!

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: New orders incoming from Galastra. Stand by.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Tenno target is identified. Transmitting coordinates. Tantivy!

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Distribution of rations has once again been delayed.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Burying parties are permitted to sell their armor and weapons.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: All free Dax are entitled to a land claim. Speak to your commanding officer.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: It is imperative that all free Dax nominate a beneficiary.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Correspondence delivered after the dated deadline will not be accepted.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: We did not betray the Orokin. The Orokin betrayed us.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Honor can never be taken from you.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Those who can no longer fight may serve with honor as Yaskutai, or accept the Bitter Tea.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Cool water flows, the moon behind a cloud. To the receptive mind, all things come in time.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Sun at mid-heaven, sovereign above all. Mind in firm action commits without reflecting.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: This was a VIP transport. Whoever Galastra's hunting, they're Orokin.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Attention! Dignitary aboard! Atten... Identify yourself.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Tauron student, first class division M four dash A. By the glory and wisdom of the Seven I salute you.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Void cloak emittings. Hidden Dax close. Careful, Tenno!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Conveyance is under attack!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Your service is acknowledged. Escort the Executor to the extraction point.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: On board is who?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: One of the Seven!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: We are sustaining unacceptable aggression!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Our passenger is in danger!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Dispatch these barbarians before they reave us apart!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Attention! We have been assaulted!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Hostility!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Another such assault and we are finished.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: This vehicle is hanging on by the rivets!

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Your defense is lamentable.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: We are in tatters. How could you neglect your duty so?

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: If our passenger dies, the responsibility will be on your addled head.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Be aware that I am authorized to perform emergency Continuity to save Orokin lives, and you are the only potential Yuvan in the vicinity.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Stay close.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: We cannot move faster without endangering our passenger.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: We will not go one step further without your protection.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: We're are you going?

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: We require an escort.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Too far.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: How can you defend us from over there?

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Hasten to our site if you please!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno. Decrypted transmission. Listen!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: ... He'll come around, or he'll serve as an example...

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Keep monitoring, Adis. We need to know more.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: Ugh, a barricade. How crude. Remove it.

sp.speaker: Palanquin
sp.speech: The terrain is treacherous. We must exercise caution. Be patient.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Adis... did... did your people do this?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: A devil-frame who did devil's work! He deserve this, Ten-no.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno! More transmission!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: ... spill an Executor's guts with everyone watching, and not go to war on the spot? No. I know how the Orokin think. Once they see a Sentient disembowel an Executor, the treaty is as good as dead...

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: That's her plan? She's insane.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Little Tenno. You are way out of your depth. Now the big fish are going to devour you. Sentient PV-22! Destroy the medical transport and kill the passenger!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You...

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: Remember this.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ballas!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Ballas is dead.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: I'm afraid the Murmur are coming. In numbers. Only a few automated defenses left between us and them. I'm trying to contact the Cavia, but...

sp.speaker: Tagfer
sp.speech: Mara lohk! Mara lohk!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: They have reverted.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Tenno. See reason! If the Indifference encroaches upon the equipment here, it could trap your mind and leave your body an empty husk!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Seal the doors, Loid. I have to go deeper.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: With the Seven split, Ballas held the casting vote. Peace is entirely in his hands, and the warmongers whisper in his ear day and night. Your presence may offend him.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: But I saved his life!

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Orokin gratitude is like summer lightning: its light is fleeting merely, and wrath soon follows. Wait outside. I shall do what I can.

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: Wise Itzam. First of the Sentient Archimedeans. Speak.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: It's Galastra, Executor. Her Anarchs now occupy every one of the known world-seeders. Many of our bloom nurseries lie in ashes! Tokh-Amn itself is threatened! We believe she may be receiving assistance. Executor Nitokh is helping.

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: The moon Perita is soon to be sovereign Sentient territory, per article 92. 'All Orokin forces to withdraw.' Remain and we violate the treaty, depart and we abandon a friend in need! What, then, would you have me do about Galastra?

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: I have spoken to my fellow Archimedean. Your... consort? It appears the world-seeders have a weakness.

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: Close the door.

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: Shake a leg. Adis and Itzam are waiting for you at Tokh-Amn.

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: Remember, this place is holy to them. So mind your manners.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You were born here? It's beautiful.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Amar! Amar!

sp.speaker: Bloom Guardian Amar
sp.speech: Amn-tavosh! Ma veren tokh-amn eet! Ma zid ik aran. Bar dakh.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: When I told Executor Ballas of the peril Tokh-Amn was facing, I little thought he would place me in charge of its defense. In this sacred place, the minds that had begun to grow on our long journey finally flowered. Tenno, Adis, in the spirit of Tokh-Amn I bind your souls together. Be the example we look to, the living truth of peace. The two of you have already been tested deeply, beyond any grade or metric. I have nothing left to teach. I deem you both Tauron Adept. May your union never be sundered.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: A graduation present from the lady herself.

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Grineer! Excellent!

sp.speaker: Anarch Grineer
sp.speech: Target identified!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: They're not ours!

sp.speaker: Bloom Guardian Amar
sp.speech: Bar-lorun! Mo heekra!Defend here! I warn the others!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Valdur? Respond!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Valdur? Come in, damn it! You've got a rogue battalion down here!

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: Negative, Tenno. Those traitors were grown off-site.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: How??

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: A rogue Executor and her lapdog. We need to get Itzam out of there now. I'm sending a shuttle. You clear a landing zone!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: backgroundAre they alive?

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: backgroundBarely. Cataleptic state. Vitals marginal.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: backgroundWhat do they see?

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: backgroundNo way to tell without joining them, wherever they are.

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: Shuttle inbound. It's taken some hits. Just make sure it sets down in one piece.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Wait! We should help!

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: No time!

sp.speaker: Archimedean Itzam
sp.speech: Thank you, Tenno. You two have been a singular headache at times, but I admit I shall miss our classes. Perhaps you might consider returning next year, to speak to the new students.

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: Just can't keep them alive, can you, kiddo? Everyone who cares for you ends up dead.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ready?

sp.speaker: Margulis
sp.speech: Galastra tried to steal the life of my love. For that alone she deserves death. But the complete extinction of the Tau blooms, which she plans to bring about, would hurl us back into a state of war. With the collusion of Executor Nitokh and her lackey Roathe, she has sequestered herself and her followers within the world-seeders, the armored Zariman Ova of old. But they have a flaw. A destruct sequence. This Ayatan holds the trigger codes. Deliver it to the world-seeder's heart and turn Galastra's fortress into her funeral pyre.

sp.speaker: Prime Grineer
sp.speech: No admittance.

sp.speaker: Assignator Korffel
sp.speech: Give 'em hell for me, kid.

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: Your people faced extinction, you found wisdom, and now you rise. Peace is trembling in our hands. Let us boldly grasp it.

sp.speaker: Dax Anarch Lustratus
sp.speech: Void knows how, but they've found us!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Bring me my Ascaris!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: You think... you are the only ones... to command the Frames?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Control frames, but no Tenno? Galastra burn herself up for sure.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Play the wolf, Tenno. Cut down the suckling lamb and join the side that's going to win.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Peace isn't won with flowers and songs! You only get peace... through sacrifice!

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: I'm going to die on my estate, here on my moon, surrounded by weeping grandchildren and howling Kubrows. Not now. And not by your hand!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: What is happen?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: It's... me. I can't do this. I don't want to do this!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Loid. What. No. You can't be here on Tau.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: You're not on Tau. This is a memory. It happened. And I'm so sorry, but we can't change any of it.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: But we're almost at the part where...

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: It's okay. I'm here. My light goes with you. Always.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: We're losing them.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Bring them back!

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: I can't! They've gone too deep!

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Murmur. Breaking the perimeter seals. Flooding the labs. It's over.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Not yet.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Tenno, I must ask you to pace yourself! Nobody doubts your strength, but the Dark Refractory places a murderous burden on the user. If you persist in your current state, there is a real risk that we will lose you!

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: I've not seen this kind of Murmur activity since the day my Albrecht left us. It's like... religious hysteria.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: Only a few remain, Tenno. Deal with them and then rest.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Prep the machine, Loid. I have to go back.

sp.speaker: Loid
sp.speech: This will be your last trip. If the process is not completed this time, you will never come back up.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Adis. I deserve to know...

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: My child.

sp.speaker: Ballas
sp.speech: In the name of the Seven, the Lady Margulis and I welcome the delegates of the Sentient Collective. How brightly Perintol's odd little star shines now.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Tell me, Tenno-brat. Why do you still serve the Orokin? Do you really trust them to keep their word?

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: It's not too late to see the light, Tenno. Even for you.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: The blind... lead the blind... and it all ends... in chaos.

sp.speaker: Anarch Galastra
sp.speech: Good. Your final evolution. Kill me.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Why would Adis ever want to be like you?

sp.speaker: World-Seeder
sp.speech: Terraforming initiated.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: We've got to get out!

sp.speaker: World-Seeder
sp.speech: Converting atmosphere.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno...

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: How many Golden curse-pods, Tenno? Enough for whole world? For whole SYSTEM?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ballas and the others. They used us. Set us up.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Voko ra'haal. Margulis dies for this.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Always you know where to find me, Ten-no.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: No!

sp.speaker: Apex Stentor
sp.speech: Attention. Following the many treacherous Sentient attacks on loyal Grineer and Dax allies, the treaty is null and void. Orokin protection is hereby withdrawn. We are at war.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Adis, you've got to stop! This is what they wanted!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Bar hakh, Tenno! Shut... up!

sp.speaker: Apex Stentor
sp.speech: Attention. A rogue Tenno operative and Sentient cohort are suspected of sabotage. They are to be brought in alive or dead.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Margulis couldn't have done this! Think, Adis! This is a setup!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: M'aran tegu LOKSH! You are blind as she!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: They're coming to kill us both! Don't you see? They'll cover it up! They always do!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno... LIES!

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno... you were right. I... am sorry-

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Shh. It's okay. It's okay. We're together.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Tenno. I heal. I try!

xml.sp: AdissingingCast and cry, cast and cry | Raise the million pylons high | All our kin are bound to fly | For that far shore forlorn

sp.speaker: Kill Squad Leader
sp.speech: Target ahead. Taking them out.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Adis? C'mon, sit up. C'mon.

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: Let me feel... sunlight?

sp.speaker: Adis
sp.speech: My light goes with you now.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Did you know?

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: Yes. I was... I was meant to make sure. But I couldn't, Tenno.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Bury him.

sp.speaker: Valdur
sp.speech: I'm meant to take him back to Tauron Academy -

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I wouldn't do that.

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: They're laughing at you up there, kiddo.

sp.speaker: Uriel
sp.speech: RAZUL-TARAT KANUMMU.

sp.speaker: Uriel
sp.speech: ?KARIS.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ballas!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You changed the codes! Didn't you?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Coward! Come out and face me!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I should've let Galastra tear you apart!

sp.speaker: Daklo
sp.speech: Tenno? Dear Void... I saw it all!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: What did you see?

sp.speaker: Daklo
sp.speech: The Grineer were prepared. They knew. The moment Ballas announced the treaty was dead, they opened fire!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Get out.

sp.speaker: Daklo
sp.speech: Yes. Yes, of course. Thank you.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: A change of heart? From a bigot like you? I don't buy it.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Burn with the rest of them.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Rap, tap, tap! You'll let me in, little piggy!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Tell me you had nothing to do with it!

sp.speaker: Margulis
sp.speech: You already know the truth.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Why am I sleepy?

sp.speaker: Margulis
sp.speech: You had a very hard day, my angel, and we have a long journey back to Lua. The Dream will keep the voices from taking hold.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You're going to make me forget.

sp.speaker: Margulis
sp.speech: I will not have them accuse you of treason. If they come for you, they will have to go through me.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: But Ballas... if he did this... he'll kill y-you...

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I'm so sorry.

sp.speaker: Natah
sp.speech: We've already had our revenge.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You were used. Just as she was.

sp.speaker: Margulis
sp.speech: We can finally begin to heal.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tau is in sight. It will not be the place that you or I remember.
